name: Signadot
description: Kubernetes-native platform for creating lightweight sandbox environments enabling microservices integration testing.

seo.title: Signadot — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Signadot: Kubernetes-native platform for creating lightweight sandbox environments enabling microservices integration testing.

when_to_use: Lightweight Kubernetes sandbox per developer branch
Test microservice changes against real production traffic
Integration testing without spinning up full environments
Baseline comparison routing for safe service testing

pros: Test microservice changes without full stack copy
Cuts cost vs full preview environments
cons: Requires Istio or Linkerd in your cluster
Concepts take time for teams to adopt
review.verdict: A smart pattern for testing microservice changes when full preview environments are too expensive to spin up.
review.best_for: Kubernetes shops with dozens of microservices doing integration testing on feature branches
review.not_for: Teams without service mesh or with monolithic deployment models
